ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the school belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the school belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent school */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the game */,
  "ticket_sales" TEXT /* Total ticket sales for the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team (school name) */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team (school name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the game */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance for the game */,
  "attendance_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of stadium capacity filled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., passing yards, rushing yards) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "opponent_stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the opponent's corresponding statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "champion_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that won the championship */,
  "runner_up_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that was the runner-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the school in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_school_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., total passing yards, total rushing yards) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "opponent_stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the opponent's corresponding statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that owns the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, subscriber) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., attendance, performance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistic (e.g., total, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to (e.g., games, reports) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to (e.g., games, reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_name FOREIGN KEY ("role_name") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
